data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Slams Trump's Pro-Business Policies And Stance On Federal Reserve: 'His Oligarchy Isn't Going To Happen'
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, the former White House communications director, has issued a stark warning about the potential dangers of a second Donald Trump presidency.

data.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg Owns Two Of The Biggest Social Media Platforms In The World. He Now Thinks This Experience On Phones Is 'Anti-Social,' And Why He's Focused On Ray-Ban Smart Glasses
data.description: Mark Zuckerberg, the CEO of Meta Platforms Inc., acknowledged that the current social media experience on smartphones is "anti-social." This revelation is part of the reason why he is focusing on the development of Ray-Ban smart glasses.

data.title: Starship Ready To Fly Again After Slight Delay: Elon Musk's SpaceX Awaits Greenlight, Sets Sights On Demonstrating Reusability
data.description: SpaceX's Starship is ready for its fifth flight test pending regulatory approval. The company aims for full reusability to reduce spaceflight costs.

data.title: Nicolas Maduro Slaps Ban On Elon Musk's X Amid Election Dispute: 'Get Out Of Venezuela For 10 Days'
data.description: Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro has imposed a 10-day ban on Elon Musk's social media platform X, formerly Twitter, following accusations that Musk incited hatred and unrest after the contentious presidential election.

data.title: Winklevoss Twins Take Sly Dig At Kamala Harris' No-Show At The Latest Roundtable: 'Don't Worry, She's Really Into Crypto'
data.description: Winklevoss twins, the co-founders of cryptocurrency exchange Gemini, expressed their disappointment over Vice President Kamala Harris’ absence at a recent cryptocurrency roundtable, despite reports of her professed interest in the sector.
